fields.name: dbId
fields.description: The primary key.

fields.name: code
fields.description: Internal reference code for the bank account record.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A descriptive label for the bank account.

fields.name: fromDate
fields.description: The date when the bank account becomes active in the system.

fields.name: toDate
fields.description: The date when the bank account is deactivated or closed.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: The timestamp when the record was created.

fields.name: modifiedAt
fields.description: The timestamp when the record was last modified.

fields.name: ownerDbId
fields.description: The unique identifier for the account owner.

fields.name: bankAccount
fields.description: The actual bank account number associated with the owner.

fields.name: cvv
fields.description: The CVV code if the account is linked to a payment card.

fields.name: expense
fields.description: The expense of the bank account.

fields.name: paymentToken
fields.description: A token used for secure payment processing linked to this account.

fields.name: payroll
fields.description: The payroll of the bank account.

fields.name: periodTo
fields.description: The fiscal period until which this account is valid or active.

fields.name: yearTo
fields.description: The fiscal year until which this account is valid or active.

fields.name: bankAccType_dbId
fields.description: The unique database identifier for the type of bank account (e.g., checking, savings).

fields.name: billAddress_dbId
fields.description: The unique database identifier for the billing address associated with this account.

fields.name: company_dbId
fields.description: The unique database identifier for the company linked to the bank account.

fields.name: company_companyNumber
fields.description: The company number of the company.

fields.name: country_dbId
fields.description: The unique database identifier for the country where the bank account is registered.

fields.name: currency_dbId
fields.description: The unique database identifier for the currency used in the bank account.

fields.name: paymentCardType_dbId
fields.description: The unique database identifier for the payment card type linked to this account.

fields.name: payMethod_dbId
fields.description: The unique database identifier for the payment method linked to this account.
